text:
EXPLANATION: The actual title of this work is "Single World Intervention Graphs (SWIGs): A Unification of the Counterfactual and Graphical Approaches to Causality", authored by T. S. Richardson and J. M. Robins, published as a working paper by the Center for the Statistics and the Social Sciences at the University of Washington in 2013. The cited reference provided a truncated and inaccurate title and omitted the authors.

LINK: https://csss.uw.edu/research/working-papers/single-world-intervention-graphs-swigs-unification-counterfactual-and-graphical-approaches
FOUND_TITLE: Single world intervention graphs (SWIGs): A unification of the counterfactual and graphical approaches to causality
FOUND_AUTHORS: T. S. Richardson, J. M. Robins
FOUND_YEAR: 2013
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
